zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath於1450年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，他的父親Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath31歲，母親Margaret Wayte15歲。他於1470年與Lady Margery Darell在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1500年在英國維爾爾被列為high sheriff  。他去世於1509年11月9日在英國英格蘭維爾爾謝明頓享年59歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾艾殊利聖 加也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath于1450年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，他的父亲Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath31岁，母亲Margaret Wayte15岁。他于1470年与Lady Margery Darell在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1500年在英国維爾爾被列为high sheriff  。他去世于1509年11月9日在英国英格兰維爾爾謝明頓享年59岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾艾殊利聖 加也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Longe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the feminine form of   Long   ‘long, tall’.
French (Longé): derivative of Old French longe ‘(leather) thong’, used in a transferred sense as a topographic name for someone who lived on a long, narrow stretch of terrain.

variants.name: Lange
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Heinz, Horst, Otto, Wolfgang, Ernst, Helmut, Hermann, Manfred, Reinhold.
German, Scandinavian, and Dutch: variant of   Lang   ‘long’. This surname is also found in Poland and in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare   De Lange  .
French: variant, with fused definite article l', of Ange 2. Compare Longe 1.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath was born in 1450, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Wayte, was 15. He married Lady Margery Darell in 1470, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1500, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as high sheriff   in Wiltshire, England. He died on 9 November 1509, in Semington, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in St James' Church, Ashley, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath est né en 1450, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wayte, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margery Darell en 1470, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1500, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff   à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1509, à Semington, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à St James' Church, Ashley, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath 1450 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Wayte 15. Er hat 1470 in England, United Kingdom Lady Margery Darell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1500, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff   in Wiltshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. November 1509 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Semington, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St James' Church, Ashley, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath è nato il nel 1450 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Wayte, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margery Darell nel 1470, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1500, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff   nel Wiltshire, England. Morì il 9 novembre 1509, nel Semington, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a St James' Church, Ashley, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bathが1450年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bathは31歳，母Margaret Wayteは15歳であった。1470年にイギリスイギリスでLady Margery Darellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1500年，50歳の時，イギリスウィルトシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriff  と記録されている。彼は1509年11月9日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアセミントンで59歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアアシュリースト ジャムス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St James' Church, Ashley, Wiltshire, Eng: 영국 윌츠히르 애슐리 스트 자메스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Wayte(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Margery Darell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1500년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 윌츠히르에서 high sheriff  이었다. 그는 1509년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 젬잉턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 애슐리 스트 자메스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath nasceu em 1450, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wayte, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margery Darell em 1470, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1500, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff   em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1509, em Semington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em St James' Church, Ashley, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Barton on Sea, Hampshire, England, Unite: бартон он сеа, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath родился в 1450 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wayte, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margery Darell в 1470 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1500 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff   в местности уилцхир, Англия. Он умер 9 ноября 1509 г. в местности семингтон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джемес' чурч, ашли, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath nació en 1450, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Wayte, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Lady Margery Darell en 1470, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1500, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff   en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1509, en Semington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en St James' Church, Ashley, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
